records.display_name: Third Ave & 57th St is a Vision Zero Priority Intersection

payload.claim_text: Third Avenue & 57th Street is a high-crash intersection for pedestrians. Vision Zero 'Priority Intersection'.
payload.description: Intersection classified as Vision Zero Priority Intersection due to high crash history, heavy turn volumes, and high pedestrian volumes.

records.raw_text: Third Avenue & 57th Street is a high-crash intersection for pedestrians. Vision Zero "Priority Intersection". Heavy turn volumes and high pedestrian volumes.

records.display_name: No bus stops between 55th and 61st on Third Ave

payload.claim_text: No bus stops between 55th Street and 61st Street. Bus cannot access curb 57th St to 59th St due to right-turn lanes to Queensboro Bridge.
payload.description: Transit gap on Third Avenue between 55th and 61st Streets with existing M101, M102, M103 bus stops only above/below this segment

records.raw_text: No bus stops between 55th Street and 61st Street. Bus cannot access curb 57th St to 59th St due to right-turn lanes to Queensboro Bridge. 57th Street is a major destination.

records.display_name: Third Avenue Offset Bus Lane (36th-56th)

payload.description: Curbside bus lane converted to offset bus lane from 36th Street to 56th Street on Third Avenue. Improves bus speeds and reliability for M101, M102, M103, and express buses. Adds daytime commercial loading space to curb.

records.display_name: Third Avenue and 57th Street Bus Boarding Island & Pedestrian Safety Improvements

payload.description: Proposed improvements at Third Avenue and 57th Street including bus boarding island for M101/M102/M103 stops, pedestrian refuges at two crosswalks, banning left turn from 57th St EB onto Third Ave, adding protected crossing time (LPI), and adding Leading Bus Interval at 55th Street.
payload.project_name: Third Avenue and 57th Street Bus Boarding Island & Pedestrian Safety Improvements
payload.project_type: bus boarding island and pedestrian safety

records.raw_text: Add boarding island two lanes from curb from 56th Street to 57th Street. Ban left-turn from 57th St EB onto Third Avenue. Add green signal time. Add protected crossing time. Add leading bus interval (LBI).
